trends.audience: Homeowners who hired a contractor and got scammed — out thousands of dollars with no recourse
trends.raw_quote: Back in spring I got completely screwed over by this contractor who basically took my money and disappeared. Lost about $12,000. Now I can't even get him served for court. I have no idea how to protect myself and find trustworthy help.
trends.emotional_trigger: Betrayal + financial devastation — the homeowner feels foolish, violated, and worried it will happen again with the next contractor
trends.product_direction: Contractor vetting guide: red flags, verification checklist, payment protection strategies, and legally binding contract templates
